zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Engaine於大約1341年出生在英國亨廷格多史爾時，她的父親John Engaine40歲，母親Joan Peverel38歲。她於1370年與Laurence de Pabenham在英國諾薩普頓史爾騰福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年9月23日在英國亨廷格多史爾奧福德 達阿希享年47歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Engaine于大约1341年出生在英国亨廷格多史爾时，她的父亲John Engaine40岁，母亲Joan Peverel38岁。她于1370年与Laurence de Pabenham在英国諾薩普頓史爾騰福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年9月23日在英国亨廷格多史爾奧福德 達阿希享年47岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Engaine was born about 1341, in Huntingdonshire, England, her father, John Engaine, was 40 and her mother, Joan Peverel, was 38. She married Laurence de Pabenham in 1370, in Thenford, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 23 September 1387, in Offord D'arcy, Huntingdonshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Engaine est née environ 1341, à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, son père, John Engaine, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan Peverel, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Laurence de Pabenham en 1370, à Thenford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 septembre 1387, à Offord D'arcy, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Engaine um 1341 in Huntingdonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Engaine 40 und ihre Mutter Joan Peverel 38. Sie hat 1370 in Thenford, Northamptonshire, England Laurence de Pabenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. September 1387 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Offord D'arcy, Huntingdonshire, England und wurde in Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Engaine è nata il circa 1341 nel Huntingdonshire, England, sua padre, John Engaine, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Joan Peverel, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Laurence de Pabenham nel 1370, nel Thenford, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 settembre 1387, nel Offord D'arcy, Huntingdonshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Engaineが約1341年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Engaineは40歳，母Joan Peverelは38歳であった。1370年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスエンフォードでLaurence de Pabenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年9月23日にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアオフォード ド'アルシで47歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Engaine(이)가 대략 1341년 영국 헌틴그도실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Engaine(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Peverel(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1370년 영국 노르섬프토실르 테퍼드에서 Laurence de Pabenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 9월 23일 영국 헌틴그도실르 퍼드 드'아르시에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Engaine nasceu aproximadamente 1341, em Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Engaine, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joan Peverel, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Laurence de Pabenham em 1370, em Thenford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1387, em Offord D'arcy, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Engaine родилась около 1341 г. в местности хантингдоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Engaine было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Peverel, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Laurence de Pabenham в 1370 г. в местности тенфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 сентября 1387 г. в местности оффорд д'арси, хантингдоншир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности камбриджешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Engaine nació aproximadamente 1341, en Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Engaine, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Joan Peverel, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Laurence de Pabenham en 1370, en Thenford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1387, en Offord D'arcy, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
